_comment: Copy this file to .forge/rbac.json to activate RBAC enforcement.
_comment2: Without .forge/rbac.json, all tool calls are open-by-default (backward-compat).

admin._comment: Full access — all scopes via global wildcard

developer._comment: Run plans, read everything, edit plan files

reader._comment: Read-only access to forge tools and audit export

ci._comment: CI/CD token — can run plans and export audit logs

assignments._comment: Map bearer token values to role arrays.
assignments._comment2: Tokens are matched literally. Use long random secrets (e.g. openssl rand -hex 32).
